name: PMMVY
target_description: Pregnant women and lactating mothers aged 19+ from specified disadvantaged categories for first or second child
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
data_source: PMMVY scheme details from pmmvy.wcd.nic.in including PMMVY 2.0 guidelines (Mission Shakti, effective 01.04.2022)

rules.description: Applicant must be at least 19 years of age
Applicant must be pregnant or lactating
Benefit applies only for first child (any gender) and second child (only if girl)
rules.ambiguity_note: Benefit for first child (any gender) and second child (only if girl). AMB-34 RESOLVED: miscarriage/stillbirth is fresh case.

rules.description: Applicant must belong to at least one disadvantaged category
rules.ambiguity_note: Must belong to at least one: SC/ST, 40%+ disabled, BPL ration card, PM-JAY beneficiary, e-Shram card, PM-KISAN/MGNREGA card, income <₹8L/year, AWW/AWH/ASHA, NFSA ration card.

rules.description: Women in regular employment with Central/State Govt or PSU are NOT eligible
rules.ambiguity_note: Women in regular employment with Central/State Govt or PSU NOT eligible. Also excludes those receiving similar maternity benefits under any other law.

required_documents.document: Eligibility Proof (any one — ration card or caste cert or income cert or MGNREGA card)

benefit_summary: First child (any gender): ₹5,000 in 2 installments (₹3,000 + ₹2,000). Second child (only if girl): ₹6,000 in 1 installment. Miscarriage/stillbirth treated as fresh case. Must apply within 270 days of birth.

application_offices.find_instruction: Nearest Anganwadi centre in your village or ward
Find the nearest CSC at locator.csccloud.in

description: Maternity benefit of ₹5,000 for the first live birth (paid in two instalments) to partly compensate for wage loss and to promote institutional delivery and healthy feeding practices. The amount is paid directly to the woman's bank account. A second incentive (₹6,000) is given under Janani Suraksha Yojana for institutional delivery.
description_hindi: पहले जीवित बच्चे के जन्म पर गर्भवती/स्तनपान कराने वाली महिलाओं को ₹5,000 मिलते हैं — दो किस्तों में। यह राशि वेतन हानि की भरपाई और पोषण सहायता के लिए है। आंगनवाड़ी से आवेदन करें। दूसरी बेटी होने पर ₹6,000 का अतिरिक्त लाभ (JSY के साथ)।
benefit_summary_hindi: ₹5,000 पहले बच्चे पर, दो किस्तों में, सीधे बैंक खाते में
